## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss operational and financial details for Growth X, including fundraising, accounting, and team management.](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Growth X recently secured funding from Madrona Ventures, with potential interest from other investors](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Transitioning from LLC to C-Corp structure, requiring careful management of financial and legal processes](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Need to establish proper accounting practices, including selecting a bookkeeping firm and setting up new systems](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Prioritizing team management and recruitment, with focus on streamlining payroll and benefits](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)

## Topics

### Fundraising and Investor Relations

  - [Secured funding from Madrona Ventures, with S. Tompkins as board member](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Potential interest from other investors (e.g., Greylock)](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Presented innovative workflow visualization tool to investors, showcasing company's capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Discussing pros and cons of adding more investors at this stage](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=2662.0)

### Financial Transition and Accounting

  - [Moving from LLC to C-Corp structure](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=2305.0)
  - [Need to set up new bank accounts, invoicing systems, and accounting practices](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=2474.0)
  - [Exploring options for bookkeeping firms (e.g., Pilot, recommendations from contacts)](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=2806.0)
  - [Discussing 409A valuation process and requirements](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=2422.0)

### Team Management and Payroll

  - [Currently using Remote for payroll, planning to transition to Deel](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=3429.0)
  - [Discussing salary adjustments and payment schedules for team members](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=3275.0)
  - [Need to streamline payroll process and move to semi-monthly payments](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=3189.0)
  - [Exploring options for employee stock options (ISOs vs NSOs)](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)

### Operational Setup

  - [Discussing company address options (co-working space vs. virtual mailbox)](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=3672.0)
  - [Setting up proper documentation and access to systems (e.g., One Password, Mercury, Amex)](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=3564.0)
  - [Transitioning email domains and aliases for consistency](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=3858.0)

### Recruiting and Team Structure

  - [Briefly touched on hiring priorities and team structure](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=3800.0)
  - [Planned further discussion on leveraging contacts for recruitment](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=3621.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule call with Albert (lawyer) to discuss financial transition and legal requirements](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=2055.0)
  - [Set up virtual mailbox for stable company address](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=3734.0)
  - [Transition bank accounts and credit cards to new C-Corp structure](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=4028.0)
  - [Explore and select bookkeeping firm for ongoing financial management](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=2806.0)
  - [Continue discussions on team management, recruitment, and operational setup](https://fathom.video/share/GLCd1z1vF8GcjphG8KVSTs_xRAf8f891?tab=summary&timestamp=3621.0)
